source.title: How do I transport crew between bases in Holosim?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How do I transport crew between bases in Holosim?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Sometimes you’ll need to move crew from one starbase to another. This is done with fleets that have passenger slots available.
Steps to transport crew
Open the Hangar menu: click on the base, then select Hangar.
Select your fleet: click the fleet you’ll use for transport.
Go to the Passenger tab: here you’ll see available crew at the base.
Load crew: click Fill capacity or manually choose how many crew members to embark.
Undock and travel: send your fleet to the destination starbase.
Dock at the new base: once arrived, open the Hangar again.
Disembark crew: move the crew from your fleet into the new base.
⚠️ Make sure to always leave the required crew in the fleet. Without them, the fleet won’t be able to continue operating.
